title: The Name Game with Mrs. Rabbit
summary: The search for the perfect name for a new baby sister leads to a musical celebration of the name Avery. While the name is joyfully sung and practiced, the family's resident naming consultant, Mrs. Rabbit, remains hilariously unimpressed with the choice.

highlightQuote.text: Ask Mrs. Rabbit. Ask Mrs. Rabbit.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Izzy, I have a different question to ask you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, Mama and I are thinking about what to name baby sister, and we're thinking about calling her Avery. What do you think?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What do you think about it? Do you like it?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Do you want to try saying her name? It's Avery. Try saying it.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ask Mrs. Rabbit. Ask Mrs. Rabbit.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mrs. Rabbit, do you like the name Avery?

characters.name: Avery
characters.description: Now christened [Name], this diminutive mole is the newest addition to Izzy’s family and Hattie’s velvety baby sister. A tiny voyager often depicted in portraits wearing oversized clothes, she is a slumbering resident aboard the ship, finding bliss in milk-filled dreams within her cozy "house" upon the storyteller’s knee. To protect [Name]’s fragile rest, the crew maintains a state of hushed reverence, ensuring the vessel remains a quiet sanctuary for its smallest, most loyal passenger.

characters.name: Mrs. Rabbit
characters.description: A toy or imaginary rabbit who is consulted for her opinion on the baby's name.

characters.name: Mama
characters.description: Pistis Mouse’s mother, the architect of the naming that defined her daughter, is a maternal mole who slips away to the store by day and is currently away at the hospital. She remains the quiet destination at the journey’s end: a presence anchored to an upstairs chair, waiting to beckon her kitten into the velvet warmth of her lap for a soft, lingering embrace.

places.name: The Family Home
places.description: The setting where the naming discussion takes place.
